response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most of their career focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in product and web applications rather than cloud infrastructure or distributed systems leadership.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse technologies and domains
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and creating technical workshops
Active open-source contributions and community engagement in developer tooling
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI role), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or distributed systems architecture experience
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps teams or large-scale infrastructure projects
